---
title: "09. 虚实逆顺与调平"
subtitle: "Excess, Deficiency, Reversal, and Rebalancing"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 9
categories: [huangdi-neijing, cultural, omega]
description: "How虚实、逆顺、补泻, and调经 map to sparse optimal regulation, anti-clustering stability, and global closure under local correction."
---

**Chapters:** 素问28, 素问34, 素问62-64, 素问77-80, 灵枢38, 灵枢46, 灵枢55, 灵枢60-61  
**Omega Directions:** `Zeckendorf representation`, `ring arithmetic`, `golden-mean shift`

{{< include articles/category_09_excess_deficiency_reversal_rebalancing.md >}}

---

[Back to Huangdi Neijing Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
